name: DSX-CA1 Content Agent — Tue/Thu/Sat
notes: Triggers Tue/Thu/Sat at 9am MST (16:00 UTC). Day maps to article_type: Tue=news, Thu=evergreen, Sat=conversion. RSS fetch is inside a Code node with timeout+fallback — workflow never fails on RSS error. FastAPI endpoint runs DSX-CA1 in background. Vars required: DECODEDSIX_API_URL, DECODEDSIX_API_KEY.
